zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短期承压震荡，存在关键支撑关注点
zh.content:
当前XRP/USD价格略高于日内低点1.1257，但仍低于20日简单移动平均线SMA(20) 1.15625，显示短期内多头受阻。价格上涨受限，加之MACD为负值，表明市场仍存在下行压力，短期趋势偏向震荡承压。  

技术指标方面，尽管RSI数据不可用，但从MACD和价格与SMA关系来看，动能偏弱，尚未形成明显反转信号。价格若突破SMA(20) 1.15625，将可能重新激活多头势能，否则维持在1.1250-1.1560区间震荡的概率较大。  

支撑位主要关注1.1250附近，这一水平为近期低点，若跌破可能引发进一步调整。阻力位则在1.1560-1.1600区间，若突破并稳固，将利于价格回升至1.18美元附近。交易者需留意区间边界的守势，谨慎布局。  

交易建议上，短线可逢低布局多单，止损设于1.1230下方；中长线投资者建议等待价格稳固突破SMA或关键阻力位再加仓，以规避震荡风险。结合市场情绪与技术指标，控制仓位、分批建仓仍为当前较为稳健的策略。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading at 1.1371, holding near the upper end of its recent intraday range between 1.1257 and 1.1372. Despite the modest 1.01% daily gain, the broader short-term trend remains cautious because price is still below the 20-period simple moving average at 1.1563. This suggests buyers have regained some momentum during the latest session, but the market has not yet confirmed a sustainable bullish reversal. A break above the moving average would strengthen the case for further upside.

The SMA(20) currently acts as dynamic resistance and highlights the prevailing short-term bearish bias. Meanwhile, the MACD value of -0.0058 remains below the neutral line, indicating that downside momentum has not fully dissipated. Although the negative reading appears relatively shallow, it still reflects lingering selling pressure. The absence of RSI data limits confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions, making price action around key technical levels especially important for traders.

From a support and resistance perspective, immediate support is located near 1.1260, corresponding closely to the recent session low. A deeper pullback could expose the psychological 1.1200 area, followed by stronger support near 1.1000. On the upside, initial resistance is found at 1.1375, just above the recent high. If buyers successfully clear that zone, attention would shift toward 1.1560–1.1600, where the 20-day moving average and prior trading activity may attract additional selling interest.

Traders with a bullish outlook may prefer waiting for a decisive breakout above 1.1375 and ideally above the SMA(20) before increasing exposure. Conservative participants could look for confirmation through rising volume and improving momentum indicators. Conversely, failure to hold above 1.1260 may encourage short-term sellers to target lower support levels. Given the mixed technical picture, disciplined risk management and carefully placed stop-loss orders remain essential until a clearer directional trend emerges.
